arts.ttl: “I was in talks…” – new Man United addition reveals Ten Hag’s crucial role in surprise Old Trafford move
arts.sum: Manchester United coach Ruud van Nistelrooy has revealed he was planning for another managerial role and talking with other clubs before receiving a call from Erik ten Hag to make a surprise return to Old Trafford. The Dutchman had impressed in a spell as manager of PSV Eindhoven, and it was a bit of a […] The post “I was in talks…” – new Man United addition reveals Ten Hag’s crucial role in surprise Old Trafford move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Manchester United confirm squad for Europa League fixture as youngster included
arts.sum: Man Utd are in action against FC Twente in the Europa League on Wednesday and their squad has been confirmed.

arts.ttl: 'I'm a Man Utd legend – I think Liverpool will have something to say in the title race'
arts.sum: Liverpool's untimely slip-up against Nottingham Forest raised slight doubts over their title-challenging capabilities this season, but one of their rivals' all-time greats still thinks they have a shout

arts.ttl: Raphael Varane retires: Former Real Madrid and Manchester United defender calls time on playing career
arts.sum: One of the most decorated defenders in the game

arts.ttl: Varane: Ex-Real Madrid and Man Utd star retires after two months at Como
arts.sum: Como centre-back Raphael Varane has announced his retirement from football only two months after joining...

arts.ttl: Manchester United hatch plan to rival Wembley for boxing fights with major selling point
arts.sum: Manchester United unveiled plans to show what a new 100,000-seater stadium could look like earlier this week and they have big plans to host boxing events in the future

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes reveals moment he thought he would be sold after Sir Alex Ferguson hairdryer treatment - before the legendary Man United boss apologised to him!
arts.sum: Scholes joked that he had built up a reputation as a 'teacher's pet' under Man United 's legendary manager, but believed he was about to be sold by the club after a bust-up following a defeat.

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United star set for shock retirement just weeks after Old Trafford exit
arts.sum: Raphael Varane left Manchester United in the summer after the expiry of his contract, signing for Cesc Fabregas' Como.

arts.ttl: No More Nike? Matthijs De Ligt to Rejoin Adidas After 2 Years?
arts.sum: Update: Matthijs De Ligt has joined Manchester United this summer.

Erik, a really important game for Manchester United and a significant game for you: 234 times you played for FC Twente. And Manchester United, that is what I represent, but also I feel part of this club.
